dto.creator: mwojtkiewicz
dto.testProcedure:
• Set up the “Neonatal Environment with ASL” as shown in Chapter 2.2
• Start the simulation “Neonate_normal” on the ASL.
• Set Compliance = 2 ml/mbar und Resistance to 50 mbar/l/s.
• Start the device
• After the startup choose patient group “Neonatal”
• Set the patient parameters to “2.0 kg”
• Select the mode ”NIV”
• If not already done run all calibrations and tests in the “System” →”Test & calib” tab
• Start the ventilation.

testSectionDTOList.descriptionGerman:
Hinweis:
Während des Parameterchecks und der Kalibration dürfen keine Schläuche am Fluke VT900A montiert sein. 

Achtung:
Der Fluke VT900A darf nur mit einem Filter betrieben werden (PN 279988), welcher sich am Inspirationseingange befindet.
testSectionDTOList.title: ........(General) Fluke VT900A - Parametercheck and calibration
Digit Number Validation Control Setting PSupport

testElementDTOList.targetRawValue:
psupport_str = str(PSUPPORT)
parts = psupport_str.split('.')
before_decimal = len(parts[0])
after_decimal = len(parts[1]) if len(parts) > 1 else 0
notation_valid = False
if PSUPPORT < 10 and before_decimal == 1 and after_decimal == 1:
    notation_valid = True
elif PSUPPORT >= 10 and before_decimal == 2 and after_decimal == 1:
    notation_valid = True

psupport_str = str(PSUPPORT)
